description.name: Lac d'Annecy Cabin
description.headline: Waterfront cabin with private dock on Europe's clearest lake
description.description: A beautifully finished wooden cabin sitting directly on the shores of Lac d'Annecy — consistently ranked the cleanest lake in Europe. Step from the private dock straight into the turquoise water, or launch a kayak from the garden. The surrounding mountains provide a dramatic backdrop in all seasons: swimming and cycling in summer, skiing at La Clusaz just 30 minutes away in winter. The cabin sleeps six across three bedrooms, with a panoramic living room that faces the lake.

reviews: The lake is right there. You literally jump off the dock into the most beautiful water. Magical in summer.
We went in October — still warm enough to swim and the autumn colours on the mountains were incredible.
The kayaks were a huge hit with the kids. Location is perfect, the cabin is cosy and well-equipped.
Probably the best view I've ever had from a living room. Watching the alpenglow on the mountains at dusk was special.

policies.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 21 days before check-in
policies.payment_schedule: 50% deposit on booking, remainder 21 days before arrival
